mapper.select: SELECT id, role_name, role_code, status, NULL AS remark, create_time AS created_at, create_time AS updated_at FROM sys_role ORDER BY id ASC
SELECT id, role_name, role_code, status, NULL AS remark, create_time AS created_at, create_time AS updated_at FROM sys_role WHERE id = #{id} LIMIT 1
SELECT id, role_name, role_code, status, NULL AS remark, create_time AS created_at, create_time AS updated_at FROM sys_role WHERE role_code = #{roleCode} LIMIT 1
SELECT id, role_name, role_code, status, NULL AS remark, create_time AS created_at, create_time AS updated_at FROM sys_role WHERE role_name = #{roleName} LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_role (role_name, role_code, status, create_time) VALUES (#{roleName}, #{roleCode}, #{status}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP)
mapper.select: SELECT p.permission_code FROM sys_role_permission rp INNER JOIN sys_permission p ON rp.permission_id = p.id WHERE rp.role_id = #{roleId} ORDER BY p.permission_code ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_permission ( permission_name, permission_code, resource_type, module_code, page_code, button_code, field_code, status ) SELECT #{permissionName}, #{permissionCode}, #{resourceType}, #{moduleCode}, #{pageCode}, #{buttonCode}, #{fieldCode}, 1 WHERE NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM sys_permission WHERE permission_code = #{permissionCode} )
mapper.select: SELECT id FROM sys_permission WHERE permission_code = #{permissionCode} LIMIT 1
SELECT * FROM sys_role_row_rule WHERE role_id = #{roleId} ORDER BY id ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_role_row_rule (role_id, page_code, match_field) VALUES (#{roleId}, #{pageCode}, #{matchField})
mapper.select: SELECT id, username, password_hash, COALESCE(nickname, user_name, account, username) AS display_name, feishu_id, 'PLATFORM' AS user_type, COALESCE(mobile, phone) AS mobile, email, status, NULL AS remark, create_time AS created_at, update_time AS updated_at FROM sys_user WHERE is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY id ASC

SELECT id, username, password_hash, COALESCE(nickname, user_name, account, username) AS display_name, feishu_id, 'PLATFORM' AS user_type, COALESCE(mobile, phone) AS mobile, email, status, NULL AS remark, create_time AS created_at, update_time AS updated_at FROM sys_user WHERE is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY id ASC

SELECT id, username, password_hash, COALESCE(nickname, user_name, account, username) AS display_name, feishu_id, 'PLATFORM' AS user_type, COALESCE(mobile, phone) AS mobile, email, status, NULL AS remark, create_time AS created_at, update_time AS updated_at FROM sys_user WHERE id = #{id} LIMIT 1

SELECT id, username, password_hash, COALESCE(nickname, user_name, account, username) AS display_name, feishu_id, 'PLATFORM' AS user_type, COALESCE(mobile, phone) AS mobile, email, status, NULL AS remark, create_time AS created_at, update_time AS updated_at FROM sys_user WHERE is_deleted = 0 AND username = #{username} LIMIT 1

SELECT id, username, password_hash, COALESCE(nickname, user_name, account, username) AS display_name, feishu_id, 'PLATFORM' AS user_type, COALESCE(mobile, phone) AS mobile, email, status, NULL AS remark, create_time AS created_at, update_time AS updated_at FROM sys_user WHERE is_deleted = 0 AND ( TRIM(COALESCE(nickname, '')) = #{displayName} OR TRIM(COALESCE(user_name, '')) = #{displayName} OR TRIM(COALESCE(display_name, '')) = #{displayName} ) ORDER BY id ASC LIMIT 1

SELECT id, username, password_hash, COALESCE(nickname, user_name, account, username) AS display_name, feishu_id, 'PLATFORM' AS user_type, COALESCE(mobile, phone) AS mobile, email, status, NULL AS remark, create_time AS created_at, update_time AS updated_at FROM sys_user WHERE is_deleted = 0 AND feishu_id = #{feishuId} LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_user ( username, password, password_hash, display_name, nickname, phone, email, status, user_name, account, mobile, feishu_id, user_type, password_salt, is_deleted, created_at, updated_at, create_time, update_time ) VALUES ( #{username}, #{passwordHash}, #{passwordHash}, #{displayName}, #{displayName}, #{mobile}, #{email}, #{status}, #{displayName}, #{username}, #{mobile}, #{feishuId}, 'PLATFORM', '', 0, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP )
mapper.select: SELECT l.id, l.user_id, l.module_code, l.operation_type, l.target_type, l.target_id, l.request_path, l.request_method, l.request_body, l.response_body, CASE WHEN UPPER(CAST(l.operation_result AS CHAR)) IN ('1', 'SUCCESS', 'TRUE', 'Y') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS operation_result, l.error_message, l.created_at FROM sys_operation_log l ORDER BY l.id DESC

SELECT id, user_id, username_snapshot, ip, user_agent, CASE WHEN UPPER(CAST(login_result AS CHAR)) IN ('1', 'SUCCESS', 'TRUE', 'Y') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS login_result, failure_reason, login_at FROM sys_login_log ORDER BY id DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_operation_log ( user_id, module_code, operation_type, target_type, target_id, request_path, request_method, request_body, response_body, operation_result, error_message, created_at ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{moduleCode}, #{operationType}, #{targetType}, #{targetId}, #{requestPath}, #{requestMethod}, #{requestBody}, #{responseBody}, #{operationResult}, #{errorMessage}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP )
mapper.delete: UPDATE sys_user SET is_deleted = 1, update_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT r.role_code FROM sys_user_role ur INNER JOIN sys_role r ON ur.role_id = r.id WHERE ur.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY ur.id ASC
SELECT * FROM sys_role_field_policy WHERE role_id = #{roleId} ORDER BY id ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_role_field_policy (role_id, module_code, page_code, field_code, policy_mode) VALUES (#{roleId}, #{moduleCode}, #{pageCode}, #{fieldCode}, #{policyMode})
mapper.select: SELECT l.id, NULL AS user_id, l.oper_module AS module_code, l.oper_type AS operation_type, NULL AS target_type, NULL AS target_id, l.request_uri AS request_path, l.request_method, l.oper_user AS request_body, l.oper_content AS response_body, CASE WHEN UPPER(CAST(l.oper_result AS CHAR)) IN ('1', 'SUCCESS', 'TRUE', 'Y') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS operation_result, l.remark AS error_message, l.created_at FROM sys_operation_log l WHERE COALESCE(l.is_deleted, 0) = 0 ORDER BY l.id DESC

SELECT id, NULL AS user_id, login_account AS username_snapshot, login_ip AS ip, user_agent, CASE WHEN UPPER(CAST(login_result AS CHAR)) IN ('1', 'SUCCESS', 'TRUE', 'Y') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS login_result, fail_reason AS failure_reason, login_time AS login_at FROM sys_login_log WHERE COALESCE(is_deleted, 0) = 0 ORDER BY id DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_operation_log ( user_id, module_code, operation_type, target_type, target_id, request_path, request_method, request_body, response_body, operation_result, error_message, oper_user, oper_time, oper_ip, oper_type, oper_module, oper_content, oper_result, request_uri, trace_id, remark, created_at, updated_at, is_deleted ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{moduleCode}, #{operationType}, #{targetType}, #{targetId}, #{requestPath}, #{requestMethod}, #{requestBody}, #{responseBody}, #{operationResult}, #{errorMessage}, #{userId}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, '127.0.0.1', #{operationType}, #{moduleCode}, #{requestBody}, #{operationResult}, #{requestPath}, 'system-trace', #{responseBody}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, 0 )
mapper.select: SELECT id, dict_name, dict_code, is_enabled AS status, remark, created_at, updated_at FROM sys_dict_type WHERE COALESCE(is_deleted, 0) = 0 ORDER BY sort_no ASC, id ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_dict_type (dict_name, dict_code, sort_no, is_enabled, remark, created_at, updated_at, is_deleted) VALUES (#{dictName}, #{dictCode}, 0, #{status}, #{remark}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, 0)
mapper.update: UPDATE sys_dict_type SET dict_name = #{dictName}, dict_code = #{dictCode}, is_enabled = #{status}, remark = #{remark}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.delete: UPDATE sys_dict_type SET is_deleted = 1, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT i.id, i.dict_type_id, t.dict_code, i.item_name AS item_label, i.item_value, i.sort_no, i.is_enabled AS status, i.remark, i.created_at, i.updated_at FROM sys_dict_item i INNER JOIN sys_dict_type t ON i.dict_type_id = t.id WHERE COALESCE(i.is_deleted, 0) = 0 ORDER BY i.id ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_dict_item (dict_type_id, item_name, item_code, item_value, sort_no, is_enabled, remark, created_at, updated_at, is_deleted) VALUES (#{dictTypeId}, #{itemLabel}, #{itemValue}, #{itemValue}, #{sortNo}, #{status}, #{remark}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, 0)
mapper.update: UPDATE sys_dict_item SET dict_type_id = #{dictTypeId}, item_name = #{itemLabel}, item_code = #{itemValue}, item_value = #{itemValue}, sort_no = #{sortNo}, is_enabled = #{status}, remark = #{remark}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.delete: UPDATE sys_dict_item SET is_deleted = 1, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
